text: , i need to create a website for a small business. the website should have a home page, about us, services, contact us, and a blog. the home page should have a hero section with a call to action, a section for featured services, a section for featured blog posts, and a section for testimonials. the about us page should have a section for the company's history, a section for the team, and a section for the mission and values. the services page should have a section for each service with a description and a call to action. the contact us page should have a contact form, a map, and a section for frequently asked questions. the blog page should have a section for each blog post with a title, image, and excerpt. the website should be responsive and mobile-friendly. the design should be modern and clean. the color scheme should be blue and white. the font should be sans-serif. the website should be built with html, css, and javascript. the website should be hosted on a static site host like netlify or github pages. the website should be optimized for search engines. the website should have a favicon. the website should have a navigation bar that is sticky. the website should have a loading animation. the website should have
